title: History sharing now enabled by default to improve table read performance for Databricks-to-Databricks Delta Sharing (GA)
body: History sharing is enabled by default (for Databricks Runtime 16.2 and above) to improve table read performance for Databricks-to-Databricks Delta Sharing. See [Improve table read performance with history sharing](/aws/en/opensharing/share-data-databricks#share-history).

ref_links.text: Improve table read performance with history sharing
